## `struct list_head` value fields directly in `task_struct` (include/linux/sched.h, struct body lines 743–1554)

**Unconditional (7):**
| Field | Line |
|---|---|
| `tasks` | 870 |
| `children` | 989 |
| `sibling` | 990 |
| `ptraced` | 999 |
| `ptrace_entry` | 1000 |
| `thread_group` | 1005 |
| `thread_node` | 1006 |

**Inside `#ifdef` blocks (7):**
| Field | Line | Needs config |
|---|---|---|
| `rcu_node_entry` | 847 | `CONFIG_PREEMPT_RCU` |
| `rcu_tasks_holdout_list` | 856 | `CONFIG_TASKS_RCU` |
| `trc_holdout_list` | 863 | `CONFIG_TASKS_TRACE_RCU` |
| `trc_blkd_node` | 864 | `CONFIG_TASKS_TRACE_RCU` |
| `cg_list` | 1227 | `CONFIG_CGROUPS` |
| `pi_state_list` | 1238 | `CONFIG_FUTEX` |
| `perf_event_list` | 1246 | `CONFIG_PERF_EVENTS` |

**Unnamed structs/unions:** none — every field with type `struct list_head` in the body sits directly under a named field, not inside an anonymous `struct {}`/`union {}`. (The struct does contain a couple of named unions, e.g. `union rcu_special rcu_read_unlock_special`, but those aren't `list_head` and aren't anonymous.)

**Excluded (different types, not counted):** `preempt_notifiers` (`hlist_head`), `pid_links[]` (`hlist_node`), `robust_list`/`compat_robust_list` (`robust_list_head __user *`, pointers), `kretprobe_instances`/`rethooks` (`llist_head`).

**Exact total: 14** `struct list_head` value fields (7 unconditional + 7 gated behind `#ifdef`).

## Real iteration example

`kernel/exit.c:471`
```c
list_for_each_entry(c, &p->children, sibling) {
        if (c->mm == mm)
                goto assign_new_owner;
}
```
This walks `p->children` (a `task_struct.children` list head) linking sibling `task_struct`s via their `sibling` member — exactly the pairing declared at lines 989–990 of `sched.h`.
